title: Exportable Publicly Shared Views
excerpt: If a board is publicly viewable, the viewing user is confined to their screen for anything they may want to do with the information. It would be great if the public view could be Exported to Excel or CSV.

posts.author: cfish (cody wilke)
posts.cookedHtml: If a board is publicly viewable, the viewing user is confined to their screen for anything they may want to do with the information. It would be great if the public view could be Exported to Excel or CSV.
